<blockquote>This file will be translated from MEDIAWIKI to MARKDOWN.</blockquote>
{{quote|This file will be translated from MEDIAWIKI to MARKDOWN.}}
[[File:markdown.svg|thumb|Markdown's logo]]
[[File:markdown.svg|Markdown's logo]]
[[File:markdown.svg]]
= Header h1a =
=Header h1b=
== Header h2a ==
==Header h2b==
=== Header h3 ===
==== Header h4 ====
===== Header h5 =====
====== Header h6 ======
'''''Boltalic'''''
'''Bold'''
''Italic''
<u>Underlined</u>
<s>Strikethrough</s>
<code>Code</code>
<pre>
Blockcodes
</pre>
# First
## Sub-first
## Sub-second
## Sub-third
# Second
# Third
# Fourth
# Fifth
# Sixth
## Sub-fourth
## Sub-fifth
## Sub-sixth
# Seventh
# Eighth
# Ninth
# Tenth
# Eleventh

'''Videogame stores:'''
* [http://apps.apple.com/ App Store] by Apple;
* [http://play.google.com/ Play Store] by Google;
* [http://xbox.com/ Xbox.com] by Microsoft;
** [http://battle.net/ Battle.net] by Activision Blizzard;
* [http://store.playstation.com/ PlayStation Store] by Sony;
* [http://nintendo.com/store/games/ Nintendo eShop] by Nintendo;
* [http://s.team/ Steam] by Valve;
* [http://gog.com/ GOG.com] by CD Projekt RED;
* [http://store.epicgames.com/ Epic Store] by Epic Games;
* [http://itch.io/ itch.io] by itch.io;
